2199350.name: New rule: The game is...
2199350.description:
You're just trying to enjoy life, but bugs keep attacking you everywhere you go. Your summer cottage, the desert, even your dreams - they're always there.

Features:

  • Twin-stick arcade shooter with bugs that won't leave you alone

  • Become a yellow arbitrary measure polytope, weaponize bureaucracy, or have an identity crisis

  • A total of ten locations where you can't escape the bugs

  • One breakfast a day keeps the bugs at bay (or does it?)

  • A game engine I made myself because I'm stubborn

  • No meta-progression because I'm lazy

What players are saying:

  • "I couldn't figure out how to move"

  • "The buttons should be styled"

  • "There's too much text"

This is not a place of honor. Nothing valued is here. What is here is repulsive to us. The form of the danger is bugs. Lots of them.
